texto: We have not succeeded in answering all our problems. The answers we have found only serve to raise a whole set of new questions. In some ways we feel we are as confused as ever, but we believe we are confused on a higher level and about more important things.
explicacao: Citação de Earl C. Kelley sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We have not succeeded in answering all our problems. The answers we have found only serve to rais…” articula reflexao, confusion, problems em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como problems e questions.
